; --- globals ---
@.fmt.int_println = private unnamed_addr constant [4 x i8] c"%d\0A\00", align 1

; --- declarations ---
declare i32 @printf(ptr, ...)

; --- definitions ---
; @InputKt_binarySearch
define i32 @InputKt_binarySearch(i32 %arg0, i32 %arg1) {
entry:
  %merge_3 = alloca i32
  %merge_7 = alloca i32
  %t0 = add i32 0, 0
  store i32 %t0, ptr %merge_3
  %t1 = add i32 0, 1
  %t2 = sub i32 %arg1, %t1
  store i32 %t2, ptr %merge_7
  br label %bb1
bb1:
  %t3 = load i32, ptr %merge_3
  %t4 = load i32, ptr %merge_7
  %t5 = icmp sle i32 %t3, %t4
  br i1 %t5, label %bb2, label %bb3
bb2:
  %t6 = load i32, ptr %merge_3
  %t7 = load i32, ptr %merge_7
  %t8 = add i32 %t6, %t7
  %t9 = add i32 0, 2
  %t10 = sdiv i32 %t8, %t9
  %t11 = icmp eq i32 %t10, %arg0
  %t12 = add i32 0, 0
  br i1 %t11, label %bb4, label %bb5
bb3:
  %t13 = add i32 0, -1
  ret i32 %t13
bb4:
  ret i32 %t10
bb5:
  br label %bb6
bb6:
  %t14 = icmp slt i32 %t10, %arg0
  %t15 = add i32 0, 0
  br i1 %t14, label %bb7, label %bb8
bb7:
  %t16 = add i32 0, 1
  %t17 = add i32 %t10, %t16
  store i32 %t17, ptr %merge_3
  br label %bb9
bb8:
  %t18 = add i32 0, 1
  %t19 = sub i32 %t10, %t18
  store i32 %t19, ptr %merge_7
  br label %bb9
bb9:
  br label %bb1
}

; @main
define i32 @main() {
entry:
  %t0 = add i32 0, 7
  %t1 = add i32 0, 20
  %t2 = call i32 @InputKt_binarySearch(i32 %t0, i32 %t1)
  call i32 (ptr, ...) @printf(ptr @.fmt.int_println, i32 %t2)
  %t4 = add i32 0, 0
  %t5 = add i32 0, 20
  %t6 = call i32 @InputKt_binarySearch(i32 %t4, i32 %t5)
  call i32 (ptr, ...) @printf(ptr @.fmt.int_println, i32 %t6)
  %t8 = add i32 0, 19
  %t9 = add i32 0, 20
  %t10 = call i32 @InputKt_binarySearch(i32 %t8, i32 %t9)
  call i32 (ptr, ...) @printf(ptr @.fmt.int_println, i32 %t10)
  %t12 = add i32 0, 25
  %t13 = add i32 0, 20
  %t14 = call i32 @InputKt_binarySearch(i32 %t12, i32 %t13)
  call i32 (ptr, ...) @printf(ptr @.fmt.int_println, i32 %t14)
  ret i32 0
}
